edit.comment: Text on a button or link that will display edit form for an entity

delete.comment: Text on a button that will cause an entity to be deleted

retry.comment: Text on a button to cause an action to retry operation

cancel.comment: Text on a button to cancel whatever opration the user was about to do

save.comment: Save button text in edit mode

clickToCopy.comment: Message to user that item can be copied to clipboard

move.comment: Action label to move an item to a different location

translate.comment: Action button to auto-translate a resource

selectAll.comment: Button to select all items in a list or filter

clearAll.comment: Button to clear all selections in a list or filter

close.comment: Button to close a dialog or dismiss a notification

dismiss.comment: Button to dismiss a notification or snackbar
